arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Mallorca injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Supercopa de Espana clash between Real Madrid and Mallorca.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold is DROPPED by Liverpool for Carabao Cup semi-final at Tottenham after Man United horror show as Real Madrid try to sign him
arts.sum: The England right-back, who has been left out for 21-year-old starlet Conor Bradley, put in one of his worst performances in a Liverpool shirt on Sunday as his side drew 2-2 with bitter rivals Man United.

arts.ttl: Starting Lineups: Real Madrid vs. UD Levante; Liga F 2024-25
arts.sum: Real Madrid XI: Misa, Antonia, Maria Mendez, Maelle Lakrar, Olga; Teresa, Leupolz; Angeldahl, Redondo, Athenea; Feller Former Levante players, Antonia, Maria Mendez and Alba Redondo all start in this game.

arts.ttl: The Future of La Fabrica: Will Real Madrid’s Youth Players Shine or Fade?
arts.sum: Setting aside that argument for a moment, if we accept the premise that the comparison to Torres is true, it would mean Asencio is a valuable, serviceable player for 2–3 seasons. The recent influx of Real Madrid youth talent being integrated into the first team has become a surprising storyline of Ancelotti 4.0.
